LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JOHN MALLICK'S MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS PURSUANT TO CCP 1094.5 IS DENIED. THE HIGHWAY PATROL ACTED APPROPRIATELY UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES. NO GROUND UNDER CCP 1094.5 TO ORDER THE WRIT. PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED STAY TO BE LIFTED ON 4/15/05. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
